summary: Branding Placement Feature Testing Complete. All 8 test cases passed. Backend API correctly saves custom fields with placement='above'/'below', handles value-only fields (empty label), and returns placement property in GET response. Frontend Settings page shows 4-column form (Label optional, Value, Position, Placement) with 'Name ke Upar'/'Name ke Neeche' dropdown options. Preview section correctly renders above fields BEFORE company name and below fields AFTER.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PUT /api/branding saves custom_field with placement='above' correctly
VERIFIED: PUT /api/branding saves field with only value (no label) - label is optional now
VERIFIED: GET /api/branding returns saved fields with placement property
VERIFIED: Frontend Settings page shows 'Placement' dropdown for each custom field row
VERIFIED: Placement dropdown has options 'Name ke Upar' (above) / 'Name ke Neeche' (below)
VERIFIED: Label field shows '(optional)' hint in column header
VERIFIED: Preview section shows fields with placement=above ABOVE the company name
VERIFIED: Preview section shows value-only fields without 'Label:' prefix
VERIFIED: Preview section shows fields with placement=below (default) BELOW the company name
VERIFIED: Default placement is 'below' when not specified
VERIFIED: Invalid placement values default to 'below'
VERIFIED: Empty value fields are NOT saved (value is required)
VERIFIED: Non-admin users cannot update branding (403 error)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, placement feature working correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding placement feature complete. Custom fields now have 4 columns: Label (optional), Value, Position (Left/Center/Right), Placement (Name ke Upar/Name ke Neeche). Preview correctly shows above fields before company name and below fields after. Backend auth.py line 116 filter changed from 'f.label && f.value' to just 'f.value' to allow value-only fields.

put_branding_placement_above.details: Custom field with placement='above' saved correctly

put_branding_value_only.details: Field with only value (empty label) saved correctly - label is optional

get_branding_placement_property.details: GET /api/branding returns placement property for all fields

frontend_placement_dropdown.details: Placement dropdown visible with 'Name ke Upar'/'Name ke Neeche' options

preview_above_fields.details: Preview shows placement=above fields ABOVE company name

preview_value_only_fields.details: Preview shows value-only fields without 'Label:' prefix

preview_below_fields.details: Preview shows placement=below fields BELOW company name (default)
